---
title: "Oracle 19c Database Health Check Report"
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.qmd
format:
  pdf:
    colorlinks: true
    documentclass: report
    classoption: landscape
    geometry:
      - a4paper
      - landscape
      - top=1cm
      - bottom=2.5cm
      - left=1cm
      - right=1cm
    keep-tex: true
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{adjustbox}
        \usepackage{tabularx}
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  out-width: 90%      # Shrink from 100% to 90% to provide a safety margin
  fig-align: center
  fig-width: 7        # Default width for generated figures
  fig-height: 4.5     # Default height for generated figures
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
is_html = False
is_pdf = True
``` 

{{< include _core_content.qmd >}}
